_publications._publicationTitle: Whole exome sequencing reveals the maintained polyclonal nature from primary to metastatic malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor in two patients with NF1.

_contextSnippet: we examined TRIM23 expression in forty MPNSTs from Washington University and UCSF, and employed Kaplan–Meier analysis to define the relationship between TRIM23 expression and overall survival
details: Successfully performed immunohistochemistry staining on MPNST tissue samples to assess TRIM23 expression levels for survival analysis
